build.beforeDevCommand: npm run build:sidecar && npm run dev
build.beforeBuildCommand: npm run build:sidecar && npm run build

security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'
security.devCsp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' ws://localhost:1420 http://localhost:1420
